api_calls.name: health_check
api_calls.purpose: Confirm the SwarmOps handoff API is reachable before case creation.

api_calls.name: load_case
api_calls.purpose: Load seeded vendor, request, stages, agents, and pending approval state.

api_calls.name: load_handoff
api_calls.purpose: Populate risk, agent output, and approval fields in Maestro Case.

api_calls.name: record_human_decision
api_calls.purpose: Record approved, rejected, or pending reviewer decision.

api_calls.name: load_evidence
api_calls.purpose: Attach or display the audit-ready evidence report.

human_tasks.label: Approve vendor setup after missing artifacts are collected
human_tasks.reviewer_instruction: Vendor setup and purchase handoff are state-changing business actions.

acceptance_checks: Six Maestro stages are visible in order.
Case fields match data/sample-case.json and the handoff endpoint.
Human approval task uses the APP-001 label.
Approval callback returns final_status approved_for_handoff for an approved decision.
Evidence JSON is attached, displayed, or linked in Final Audit.
claim_guard: This is a verified local handoff package. Do not claim a live UiPath Maestro connection until Automation Cloud footage exists.
